headline: Union Pacific picks up Canadian National's support for its plan to acquire Norfolk Southern railroad
summary: Union Pacific struck a deal with Canadian National to secure that rival's support for its proposed $85 billion acquisition of Norfolk Southern railroad.  The deal to create the nation's first transcontinental railroad has been divisive within the industry because it would concentrate so much market power in the hands of one company that would control more than 40% of all rail traffic and reduce the number of major freight railroads in the United States down to five.  BNSF, CPKC and CSX railroads all strongly oppose the merger, but now Canadian National said it will support it after winning concessions from Union Pacific.

content.title: Union Pacific picks up Canadian National's support for its plan to acquire Norfolk Southern railroad
content.summary: Union Pacific struck a deal with Canadian National to secure that rival's support for its proposed $85 billion acquisition of Norfolk Southern railroad.  The deal to create the nation's first transcontinental railroad has been divisive within the industry because it would concentrate so much market power in the hands of one company that would control more than 40% of all rail traffic and reduce the number of major freight railroads in the United States down to five.  BNSF, CPKC and CSX railroads all strongly oppose the merger, but now Canadian National said it will support it after winning concessions from Union Pacific.

thumbnail.caption: FILE - A Union Pacific train travels through Union, Neb., July 31, 2018. (AP Photo/Nati Harnik, File)

headline: Norfolk Southern reports second quarter 2026 results
summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) announced Thursday its second quarter 2026 financial results. For the quarter, revenue was $3.5 billion, income from railway operations was $1.1 billion, operating ratio was 67.6%, and diluted earnings per share were $3.26.

content.title: Norfolk Southern reports second quarter 2026 results
content.summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) announced Thursday its second quarter 2026 financial results. For the quarter, revenue was $3.5 billion, income from railway operations was $1.1 billion, operating ratio was 67.6%, and diluted earnings per share were $3.26.

headline: Norfolk Southern’s (NYSE:NSC) Q2 CY2026: Strong Sales, Stock Soars
summary: Freight transportation company Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 11.4% year on year to $3.47 billion. Its GAAP profit of $3.26 per share was 0.6% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: These Industrial Stock Moves Send A Bullish Signal About The Economy
summary: Industrial stocks bucked a falling market on Thursday. The State Street Industrial Select Sector SPDR ETF popped back into in a buy zone, led by gap-ups and breakouts for CSX, RTX and others. Many holdings in this exchange traded fund delivered blowout earnings this week.
